extDesc.message: Quickly find, switch to, or close tabs that are outputting audio.

emptyActive.message: No tabs are currently playing audio

untitledTab.description: Fallback text shown when a tab has no title

muteTabAriaLabel.description: Accessible name for the button that mutes a tab

unmuteTabAriaLabel.description: Accessible name for the button that unmutes a tab

tabMutedAnnouncement.description: Message announced by screen readers when a tab is muted

tabUnmutedAnnouncement.description: Message announced by screen readers when a tab is unmuted

operationFailed.message: The operation could not be completed.
operationFailed.description: Message displayed/announced when an operation fails

muteAllTabs.description: Text for the button that mutes all tabs

muteAllComplete.description: Message announced by screen readers when all tabs are muted

muteAllPartialFailure.message: Some tabs could not be muted.
muteAllPartialFailure.description: Message announced by screen readers when some tabs fail to mute

commandCycleAudibleTabs.message: Go to the next audible tab
commandCycleAudibleTabs.description: Description of the shortcut that cycles through audible tabs
